Class TacletOptionsSettings.ChoiceEntry

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings.TacletOptionsSettings.ChoiceEntry
Enclosing class:
TacletOptionsSettings
public static class TacletOptionsSettings.ChoiceEntry extends Object
Represents a choice with all its meta information.
